title: When Was the First Time
questions: When was the first time you used the Internet? How was it?
When was the first time you went to the cinema? What did you see?
When was the first time you used a mobile phone? Who did you call?
When was the first time you thought life was great? What happened?
When was the first time you traveled alone? Where did you go?
When was the first time you had some real money? How did you feel?
When was the first time you thought the world was a dangerous place?
When was the first time you smoked / drank?
When was the first time you flew? What was it like?
When was the first time you bought someone a present?
When was the first time you fell in love with someone or something?
When was the first time you studied English? Did you like it?
When was the first time you bought something expensive? Do you still have it?
When was the first time you met your best friend? Was it instant friendship?
When was the first time you heard your favourite song?
When was the first time you earned some money? Was it worth it?
When was the first time you decided on your own hairstyle? Did it look fantastic?
When was the first time you failed or did poorly in an exam?
When was the first time you regretted doing something? Do you still regret it?
When was the first time you remember feeling real pain? What happened?
